summary: CVE-2025-2296 affecting package edk2 for versions less than 20230301gitf80f052277c8-44
details: EDK2 contains a vulnerability in BIOS where an attacker may cause “ Improper Input Validation” by local access. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability could alter control flow in unexpected ways, potentially allowing arbitrary command execution and impacting Confidentiality, Integrity, and Availability.
